title: YTPMVs
description: This resource pack adds some YTPMVs from my collection
body:
The idea of ​​creating this resource pack originally came to me in early 2022, but I simply forgot about it later. You'll have to find out yourself which songs play where, but i've done my best to make them fit where they play as I didn't want their placement to be random and unfitting. Advantages: Audio quality: AAC (130-192) or OPUS (130) to OGG.
YTPMV were taken from such channels as: Taichan, Coron 3, Casta, K1B0D, Meltdrum/Noble, beoh, Getsuren (雪), ThatDutchLad, Lixi BaKa, Maxine/Swormax, ColaLK, Motchanもっちゃん, 9D, Robyn, Robomi and The Humilau City Collab.
